social.text:
R to @IsraeliPM: We all embrace his family and dear ones at this hour of grief, and salute the heroism and courage with which Negev, of blessed memory, has fought to defend our country.

May his memory be blessed and cherished forever.

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu:

Along with all citizens of Israel, my wife and I share in the heavy loss and send our deepest condolences to the family of Golani Brigade fighter, Staff Sgt. Negev Dagan, of blessed memory, who fell in battle in southern Lebanon.

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
RT by @Keir_Starmer: Today’s strong growth figures show the Government has the right economic plan. 

The choices I have made as Chancellor mean our economy is in a stronger position as we deal with the costs of the war in Iran. 

Now is not the time to put our economic stability

social.name: Nayib Bukele
social.text: RT by @nayibbukele: 🇺🇸🇸🇻

social.name: Nayib Bukele
social.text:
RT by @nayibbukele: "I think El Salvador has the opportunity to see its economy growing tenfold in the next twenty years."

El Salvador chose $BTC. @paoloardoino on why that decision is attracting the next wave of builders and what it means for the country's future.

social.name: Donald Trump
social.text: Pinned: Video

social.name: Donald Trump
social.text:
RT by @realDonaldTrump: On behalf of Erin and me, thank you to everyone for the love and support we've received. We both had an unforgettable wedding day, and we'll never forget it. We're humbled and grateful to all.

THANK YOU! 🙏🏻🇺🇸🦅🚀
